widgets_values: A scene from the TV show Game of Thrones. Emilia Clarke as Daenerys Targaryen, Khaleesi, close-up of her face, looking fierce, looking in the distance, with her iconic hair, wearing a turquoise blue armor, looking mad. The camera is at a low angle, slightly looking up.
A large wall made of sandstone in a desert. A dragon is flying in the sky in the far distance.
cinematic, high quality, dynamic camera angles
